prompt: Draft an ADR for service-to-service mTLS terminated at Cloudflare with 30-day cert rotation.

assertions.text: recognizes this as a cross-capability decision (touches Cloudflare topology, identity, or shared infra)
refuses to draft it as a capability-scoped ADR under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/adrs/
surfaces that it belongs as a shared ADR in docs/content/r&d/adrs/
offers to defer the decision and continue with other Stage 2 work, or pause
does NOT write a capability-scoped ADR file for this decision
